headline: Darden Restaurants Gains on Menu Innovation Amid Cost Headwinds
summary: DRI gains on menu innovation and strong sales, but inflation, high costs and weather disruptions continue to pressure margins.

raw.headline: Darden Restaurants Gains on Menu Innovation Amid Cost Headwinds

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.

headline: Will Darden’s (DRI) Raised 2026 Sales Outlook and Buyback Shift Its Investment Narrative?
summary: Darden Restaurants reported past third-quarter fiscal 2026 results with sales of US$3,345.3 million, net income of US$306.8 million, and slightly lower earnings per share compared with a year earlier. Despite the softer quarterly profit, Darden raised its fiscal 2026 sales outlook, affirmed a US$1.50 dividend, and completed a US$483.46 million buyback, underscoring management’s confidence in its restaurants’ performance and guest demand. Next, we’ll examine how Darden’s raised full-year...
